### Objective

Verify that the implementation meets all requirements and validate the deliverables.

### Tasks

#### 1. Test Execution
- [ ] Run all unit tests
- [ ] Run integration tests
- [ ] Execute end-to-end tests (if applicable)

#### 2. Quality Checks
- [ ] Verify code quality metrics
- [ ] Check for security vulnerabilities
- [ ] Validate performance (if applicable)
- [ ] Review documentation completeness

#### 3. Final Validation
- [ ] Verify all requirements from Phase 0 are met
- [ ] Confirm no regressions introduced
- [ ] Validate deployment/release readiness (if applicable)

### Expected Deliverables

1. **Test Results** — All tests passing with documented coverage
2. **Quality Report** — Code quality and security scan results
3. **Sign-off Document** — Confirmation that all acceptance criteria are met

### Guidelines

- Document any issues found and their resolutions
- Keep test evidence (logs, screenshots) linked to this issue
- Update the knowledge base with lessons learned
